title: Rafa's Colorful Menu
description: Rafa paints the menu of Tropical Bites in every color. Learn colors and the English adjective rule: the adjective goes BEFORE the noun.
summary_pt_br: O Rafa pinta o cardápio do Tropical Bites em todas as cores. Aprenda as cores e a regra do adjetivo antes do substantivo ('red car', não 'car red').

scenes.subtitle_pt: O cardápio do food truck do Rafa

scenes.text_en:
Rafa wiped the board. Rafa picked up a pen.
'Colorful menu,' he said. 'Let's start, and then…
YELLOW mango juice, RED salsa hot.
GREEN lime tacos — the best of the lot.
WHITE rice and beans. BLACK coffee, too.
BLUE skies above — but you don't EAT blue.'
scenes.text_pt:
O Rafa limpou o quadro. Pegou caneta na mão.
'Cardápio colorido,' disse. 'Vamos começar, então…
Suco AMARELO de manga. Salsa VERMELHA picante.
Taco de limão VERDE — o sabor mais marcante.
Arroz BRANCO com feijão. Café PRETO, quase nu.
Céu AZUL lá em cima — mas comer azul, não pô?'

scenes.title: Adjective BEFORE the noun — always
scenes.body_en: In English, description goes first, thing goes second. 'A red car', NEVER 'a car red'. And adjectives don't change for plurals: 'one red car' → 'two red cars' (the adjective stays the same).
scenes.body_pt: Em inglês o adjetivo vem ANTES do substantivo. 'Red car' (carro vermelho) — nunca 'car red'. E adjetivos NÃO flexionam: 'red car' → 'red cars' (o adjetivo não vai para o plural).

examples.en: A yellow mango, two yellow mangoes
examples.pt: Uma manga amarela, duas mangas amarelas

examples.en: A green lime, ten green limes
examples.pt: Um limão verde, dez limões verdes

exercise.question: Rafa writes 'salsa vermelha' on the English menu. Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: English puts the adjective BEFORE the noun: 'a red salsa'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Lembre: adjetivo antes do substantivo. 'Red salsa', não 'salsa red'.

exercise.explanation: Six starter colors. Say them with a thing: 'red pepper', 'blue wave', 'white sand'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Sempre pratique COM um substantivo: 'red pepper' em vez de 'red' solto.

turns.en: How much is a green lime taco?
turns.pt: Quanto custa o taco de limão verde?

turns.en: Ten reais. A good, cheap, tasty taco.
turns.pt: Dez reais. Um taco bom, barato e gostoso.

turns.en: Two, please. And one yellow juice.
turns.pt: Dois, por favor. E um suco amarelo.

exercise.question: I want TWO ___ tacos. (new → plural)
exercise.explanation: The adjective NEVER pluralizes. 'Two new tacos' — not 'two news tacos'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Adjetivo em inglês NUNCA vira plural. Só o substantivo muda.

exercise.question: A BIG FRENCH car. Which order is natural in English?
exercise.explanation: English order: size BEFORE origin/nationality. 'A big French car', not 'a French big car'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ordem preferida em inglês: tamanho antes de nacionalidade. 'Big French car' soa nativo.

scenes.text_en:
Cosmo barked twice. He stole a hot, small, tasty piece of bread.
Rafa shouted, 'COSMO! Bad dog!'
(But Cosmo wagged his tail instead.)
scenes.text_pt:
Cosmo latiu duas vezes. Roubou um pedaço de pão quente, pequeno e saboroso.
O Rafa gritou: 'COSMO! Cão malcriado!'
(Mas o Cosmo abanou o rabo, animado.)

scenes.title: Ordering at Tropical Bites
scenes.pt_summary: No food truck do Rafa — pedindo tacos, salgados e sucos.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome to Tropical Bites. What can I get you?
turns.pt: Bem-vindo ao Tropical Bites. O que vai querer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Hi. I would like two chicken tacos.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Mild, please. I cannot eat spicy food.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: No problem. Would you like a drink?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you. Your order will be ready in five minutes.
turns.pt: Obrigado. Seu pedido fica pronto em cinco minutos.

scenes.title: Listening story — Rafa's Colorful Menu
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Rafa and a student. Rafa paints the menu of Tropical Bites in every color. Learn colors and the English adjective rule: the adjective goes BEFORE the noun. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Welcome to Tropical Bites. What can I get you?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Hi. I would like two chicken tacos.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Mild, please. I cannot eat spicy food.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: No problem. Would you like a drink?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Rafa. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Rafa's Colorful Menu". Rafa paints the menu of Tropical Bites in every color. Learn colors and the English adjective rule: the adjective goes BEFORE the noun. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Rafa's Colorful Menu". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Rafa's Colorful Menu'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Rafa's Colorful Menu".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: British Council · A1
sources.pt_hint: Diálogos A1 do British Council, com áudio.
